description: Mobile-first performance budget for Employed. Read by scripts/check-bundle-size.mjs and scripts/lighthouse-mobile.mjs. Targets a low-end Android device on simulated Slow 3G — the realistic floor for Mozambique. Update with PR review when a budget shift is justified.

bundle.comment: Sizes are gzip-compressed bytes. Measured by walking the directory produced by `meteor build --debug --directory build/ ` and summing client assets matching the patterns below. Hard cap = CI fails. Soft cap = warning.

lighthouse.comment: Scores 0..100. Mobile preset, simulated Slow 4G + 4x CPU slowdown. Pass if every score >= minScore.

vitals.comment: Field-style targets surfaced by Lighthouse mobile audit. These are advisory until we wire RUM via Sentry.
